title: 函館スプリントSにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It is the day of the Hakodate Sprint Stakes, the
first out of our next three goal races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Anticipating the long battle ahead, Sakura
Bakushin O makes her way to the track!
